theme: Light Theme with Solid Accent Backgrounds
emotion_and_vibe: Youthful, playful, friendly, energetic. High contrast between vibrant electric blue background and clean white curved cards with lime green accents.

background.description: Electric Blue - used for the main app background and hero areas to create high energy.

surface.description: White for primary content cards to maintain readability. Soft pastels for subject/course cards. Dark slate for focus mode extension context.

accents.primary_description: Lime Green - used for decorative blobs, highlight shapes, and primary action buttons.
accents.secondary_description: Playful Orange - used for 3D illustrations, warnings, or secondary pills.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous, asymmetrical, and overlapping. Cards should look like stacked paper or playful widgets.

components.cards: White background, rounded-[2rem], massive drop shadow. Often featuring a pseudo-element or absolute positioned SVG 'paperclip' at the top. Internal padding p-8.
components.buttons: Pill-shaped (rounded-full). Primary CTAs are Lime Green (#C5E92E) with Dark Text (#0F172A) or Royal Blue (#1D4ED8) with White Text. Must have translate-y-1 hover effect.
components.pills_and_tags: Small rounded-full items with bright pastel backgrounds and bold text, used for 'subject category' or 'progress status'.
components.chrome_extension_popup: Width 350px-400px. High density but retains the rounded-[2rem] styling. Focus mode toggles should use the Lime Green accent. Context-aware RAG chat uses soft speech bubbles.
components.mastery_map: Interactive node graph visualization. Nodes should use the pastel palette (mint, peach, blue) against a clean white or deep slate background.
components.adaptive_quiz: Single card layout, centered, extremely clean to avoid cognitive overload. High-contrast progress bar at the top.

motion.hover: Playful bounce: hover:-translate-y-1 transition-transform duration-200 ease-out
motion.illustrations: Slow, subtle floating animation (translate-y up and down infinitely) for 3D elements.

image_urls.description: Abstract 3D shapes floating (used as decorative sticker over UI cards)
Colorful glass/3D object (used for empty states or hero section)
Playful set, slide, ball pit (used for dashboard welcome section background)
Colorful 3D Question marks (used for Adaptive Quiz and RAG Chat screens)

testing.instructions: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute formatted in kebab-case representing the role, e.g., data-testid='start-quiz-button' or data-testid='subject-card-math'.

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL FONTS: Ensure you include Google Fonts for 'Fredoka' and 'Nunito' in the index.html or global css.
INSTALL ICONS: Use 'lucide-react' for clean UI icons, but scale them up and add soft background circles to match the playful vibe.
BACKGROUND: The main app wrapper should have className='bg-[#2E7CF7] min-h-screen'. Do not use default white/gray backgrounds.
CARDS: All major layout blocks (workspace, dashboard panels) should be white cards with 'rounded-[2rem] shadow-xl'.
DECORATIVE ELEMENTS: Add absolute positioned tags using the 3d_decoration URLs overlapping the edges of cards to recreate the 'stickers/toys' look from the reference.

PAPERCLIPS: For the 'paperclip' look requested, create a small absolute div shaped like a capsule (w-4 h-12 rounded-full border-2 border-slate-300 bg-white/50 shadow-sm) placed overlapping the top edge of subject cards to make them look attached.

CHROME EXTENSION: Build a specific route or layout mode for the extension popup (max-w-[400px] h-[600px] overflow-hidden bg-white) featuring the RAG chat and focus mode toggle prominently. Use the same rounded styles inside.
TESTING: Apply data-testid to EVERY clickable element (tabs, cards, buttons, chat inputs).
